papers.title: Political Ideology, Fiscal Policy, and Corporate Tax Behavior: A Systematic Review
papers.authors: Marques, Vagner; Sousa, Erivelto Fioresi de; Leal, Erika
papers.abstract_pt: Este working paper revisa sistematicamente a literatura sobre ideologia política, política fiscal e comportamento tributário corporativo, identificando evidências, lacunas teóricas e oportunidades para pesquisas futuras.
papers.abstract_en: This working paper systematically reviews the literature on political ideology, fiscal policy, and corporate tax behavior, identifying evidence, theoretical gaps, and opportunities for future research.

papers.title: How Accounting Regulation Transmits Information to Capital Markets: Evidence from Revenue Recognition Reform
papers.abstract_pt: Este working paper investiga como mudanças na regulação contábil transmitem informação aos mercados de capitais, com foco na reforma do reconhecimento de receitas e seus efeitos informacionais.
papers.abstract_en: This working paper examines how accounting regulation transmits information to capital markets, focusing on revenue recognition reform and its informational effects.
